text: Front-load the primary keyword — category-defining term in the first ~75 chars of the title.
One term, one place — indexing counts a keyword once; don't repeat indexed words.
Backend = pure discovery reserve — synonyms, misspellings, other-language variants not in visible copy.
Fill every attribute field — blank structured fields = lost filters + COSMO retrieval uncertainty.
Map to the tightest valid browse node — verify acceptance in Product Classifier.
Cover the full query surface — head terms, long-tail, use-case phrases, misspellings without duplication.
Write for situations, not just keywords — lead content with the buyer situation.
One situational anchor per major use-case — a distinct, quotable line per core scenario.
Use comparative framing — state what the product is for vs. alternatives and who it's best for.
Keep A+ modules as real text — comparison, who-it's-for, FAQ must be extractable text.
Mirror compliant buyer/review language — align copy with real review phrasing.
Seed accurate structured Q&A — mirror the same facts in bullets and A+ FAQ.
Substantiated trust > forbidden social proof — no star/review claims; use documentable signals.
Consistency is a ranking and trust asset — every recurring fact must agree across all surfaces.
Time events 6–8 weeks ahead — land listing changes early for reindex + AI-model incorporation.
Worker ≠ checker — whoever writes copy never approves it; independent verification before advance.
